subtitle: Compare renting vs buying - Find your perfect POS solution

business.title: What type of business do you run?
business.subtitle: Select your business type for personalized recommendations
business.cafetariaDesc: Snack bar serving fries, snacks, and drinks. Features include order modifications, dine-in or takeaway options, bottle deposit handling, and special customer requests.
business.takeawayDesc: Pickup-only service. Customers order at the counter or online. Features include swiping, combos, quick buttons, portions, twin items, price changes, and even creating new dishes while ordering.
business.wokDesc: Fast casual with high table turnover. Customers choose their own ingredients and sauce. Quick wok preparation.
business.restaurantDesc: Full-service restaurant with multiple courses. Table service, reservations, floor plans, table splitting/merging, drink refills, and payment options. Can work alongside a takeaway system.
business.deliveryDesc: No physical location. Delivery with postal codes, address registration, and customer data management. Fully online delivery service.
business.error: Please select a business type to continue
